nasb.text: Then Absalom sent for Joab, to send him to the king, but he would not come to him. So he sent again a second time, but he would not come.

esv.text: Then Absalom sent for Joab, to send him to the king, but Joab would not come to him. And he sent a second time, but Joab would not come.

cnv.text: 押沙龍派人去叫約押來，要託他去見王，約押卻不肯來見他。他第二次再派人去叫他，他還是不肯來。

ccb.text: 他派人去请约押来，托他去求见王，但约押不肯来。第二次再请，他还是不肯来。
